title: Files — VPS file manager
description: Finder-style OS app for the VPS filesystem: favorites sidebar, breadcrumb + back/forward history, grid/list view, sort, multi-select, cut/copy/paste, inline rename, new folder, delete, upload, right-click menu, and storage usage. Reads/mutates via the os-api fs contract (mock and live host both writable within OS_FS_WRITE_ROOTS; errors surface inline).

peers.reason: renders as a window app; openWindow routes file opens to media-viewer/code-editor
